32.reason: [Queue empty condition should be front < rear; using <= may process an extra stale element and cause undefined behavior]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Queue empty condition should be front < rear; using <= may process an extra stale element and cause undefined behavior]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: Should be while(front < rear). Using <= causes an extra dequeue when queue is empty, leading to stale element being processed.

105.reason: [Queue global variables front and rear are not reset to 0 before this call, leading to incorrect BFS traversal]

41.reason: Error: In BFS, visited should be set when enqueuing, not when dequeuing, to prevent duplicate enqueues and potential queue overflow.
